# Legal Solutions

> Immigration law firm in Warsaw, Poland. Helping foreigners legalize their stay — residence permits (karta pobytu), permanent residence (PMŻ), Polish citizenship, EU Blue Card, work permits, international protection, appeals, business registration, accounting. 6 years on the market, 3,000+ cases handled, 98% approval rate. Languages: English, Russian, Ukrainian, Polish, Spanish, Turkish, Azerbaijani, Hindi.

Service catalog: from PLN 2,500 for standard karta pobytu, PLN 4,000 for PMŻ, PLN 5,500 for citizenship, PLN 3,500 for Blue Card. Free WhatsApp consultation — typically reply in 15 minutes. From 27 April 2026, all residence applications go through MOS (online portal) — Profil Zaufany required.

Primary contact channels: WhatsApp +48 735 248 525 (legalization), +48 576 228 316 (housing department), email legalsol.communication@gmail.com.

## Karta Pobytu — Residence Permit
- [Karta Pobytu — complete guide](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/karta-pobytu-guide-en): full step-by-step for first-time applicants
- [Karta Pobytu for Indian citizens (2026)](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/karta-pobytu-india-citizens-2026-en): India-specific paperwork, employer documents, timelines
- [Renewal — step by step](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/karta-pobytu-renewal-step-by-step-2026-en): when to apply, what changes vs first application
- [If your application is rejected — appeal process](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/karta-pobytu-denied-appeal-en): how appeals work, success rate, fees
- [Karta Pobytu via MOS online (2026)](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/mos-online-submission-en): new mandatory online portal explained
- [Karta Pobytu yourself vs agency — real cost (2026)](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/karta-pobytu-yourself-vs-agency-real-cost-2026-en): money + time tradeoffs

## Permanent Residence (PMŻ)
- [PMŻ vs Long-Term EU Residence — which to choose](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/permanent-residency-poland-guide-en): differences and when each applies
- (More PMŻ-specific guides being published — check /blog for the latest)

## Polish Citizenship
- [Polish citizenship path](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/polish-citizenship-path-en): naturalization routes, timelines, language exam (B1)

## EU Blue Card
- [EU Blue Card for Poland](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/eu-blue-card-poland-en): salary thresholds, qualifications, fast-track

## International Protection
- [International Protection in Poland 2026 — complete guide](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/international-protection-poland-2026-complete-guide-en): who qualifies, application steps, rights while waiting
- [International Protection vs Asylum vs Tolerated Stay](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/international-protection-vs-asylum-vs-tolerated-stay-poland-en): distinctions, when each fits

## Work Permits & Visas
- [Work permit India → Poland](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/work-permit-india-poland-2026-step-by-step-en): step-by-step for Indian workers
- [Work permit Bangladesh → Poland](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/work-permit-bangladesh-poland-detailed-en): Bangladesh-specific channel
- [Work visa Poland from India — cost (2026)](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/work-visa-india-poland-cost-2026-en): real fees in PLN

## PESEL, Profil Zaufany, Driving License
- [PESEL guide for foreigners](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/pesel-guide-en): how, where, when
- [Profil Zaufany — official Polish digital ID](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/profil-zaufany-guide-en): mandatory from 27.04.2026 for MOS
- [Driving license exchange](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/driving-license-exchange-en): Indian/Bangladeshi → Polish license

## Housing in Warsaw
- [How LegalSol helps foreigners find housing in Warsaw](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/how-legalsol-helps-foreigners-find-housing-warsaw-2026-en): our housing service
- [Avoid rental scams — foreign tenant guide](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/avoid-rental-scams-warsaw-foreign-tenants-2026-en): scam patterns and how to spot them
- [Best Warsaw districts for foreign workers](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/best-warsaw-districts-foreign-workers-rent-2026-en): districts by budget, commute, community
- [Meldunek — address registration help](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/meldunek-address-registration-help-foreigners-2026-en): why required, how to get it

## Practical Life in Poland
- [Banking for foreigners](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/banking-poland-foreigner-en): which banks accept newcomers without PESEL
- [How to open a bank account in Poland](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/how-to-open-bank-account-poland-foreigner-en): documents, fees, online vs branch
- [ZUS — social insurance explained](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/zus-social-insurance-guide-en): contributions, healthcare access
- [Taxes for foreigners in Poland](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/taxes-poland-foreigner-en): residency rules, PIT, how to file
- [Healthcare for foreigners](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/healthcare-poland-foreigner-en): NFZ, private clinics, finding English-speaking doctors

## Business — JDG, Company Registration
- [Open JDG (sole proprietorship) in Poland](https://www.legalsol.pl/blog/open-jdg-poland-en): when to choose JDG, registration steps, tax options
